case_title: MICHAEL LIANG VS. CHRISTINE EILEEN ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CHRISTINE EILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CHRISTINE EILEEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, CHRISTINE EILEEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
